subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who art near unto the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter of the first of Rabi'u'l-Avval hath arrived and its contents were noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب درگاه جمال مبارک نامه غره ربیع الاول رسید از مضمون معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @martyrs and martyrdom
